reviews.review_description: Always gets to 3/4 download and then stops

That's  quite good apart from the sights don't match the shot ! It's off centre. I got the subject in my sights but when i shoot ! The bullet shoots left missing the target.  Otherwise i like it. Well done

developer_response.body: Thank you very much, we will look to the issue that you mentioned.

reviews.review_description: Keeps telling me that my oculus needs to be updated. I've looked everywhere and it's up to date. No reason this shouldn't work but doesn't

reviews.review_title: Don't know who to shoot on 1st game HELP
reviews.review_description:
I downloaded and purchased this game, I've played it on my Samsung phone and tablet.... It is a great game to play and when I see it on oculus go I was thrilled...
I can't even get off level 1 I fail it every time... I've tried and killed everyone but I still fail???
Any help or advice would be greatly appreciated
Basically it doesn’t work. The developers need to give me my money back or sort it out ASAP.
Not only is this game not worth your money, it isn’t worth your time either.  And that’s even if you’re planning on buying just to check out how bad it is.  It’s just bad.
This is why VR will become popular, because of games like this. Highly Addictive.
Awesome, guys! It just runs great on stronger devices! Atm a remarkable sniper game on the market!

reviews.review_title: I felt like a burnt spy
reviews.review_description: Just getting into it, and no more missions.
99 cents got me one intro mission and that’s it. There’s no clear understanding of what you’re supposed to do in the 2nd mission. The rest of the game could actually be good but I’ll never know.

I have to play the missions multiple times to actually figure out my objectives through trial and error. Made it to mission 4 or 5 by the time I got bored having to replay over and over. 
_______________
SPOILERS AHEAD
_______________
In the second mission you need to protect your informant and her contact (you actually can't... he dies and it exposes 2 shooters you need to eliminate) in another mission you need to shoot 2 terrorists and they described 1 of the targets as medium build, dark hair, and low class job.... (construction worker), another is to protect her contact which you have no idea who it is... (shot the red ninja).
Then got bored and quit before hopefully my last missions.
